28 #include "ros/single_subscriber_publisher.h"
29 #include "ros/subscriber_link.h"
30 
31 namespace ros
32 {
33 SingleSubscriberPublisher::SingleSubscriberPublisher(const SubscriberLinkPtr& link)
34 : link_(link)
35 {
36 }
37 
38 SingleSubscriberPublisher::~SingleSubscriberPublisher()
39 {
40 }
41 
42 void SingleSubscriberPublisher::publish(const SerializedMessage& m) const
43 {
44  link_->enqueueMessage(m, true, true);
45 }
46 
47 std::string SingleSubscriberPublisher::getTopic() const
48 {
49  return link_->getTopic();
50 }
51 
52 std::string SingleSubscriberPublisher::getSubscriberName() const
53 {
54  return link_->getDestinationCallerID();
55 }
56 
57 } // namespace ros
